text:
LONG NAME: BENE_PRMRY_PYR_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the primary payer payment amount that is present on any of the 
claim records included in the stay (i.e., the sum of the primary payer amounts reported on the claims 
that comprise the stay). 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
